projects.title: HTTP/1.1 Server Using TCP
projects.description: Built a functional HTTP/1.1 server from raw TCP sockets in Go without using net/http package. Implemented manual parsing of request line, headers, and body with proper response formatting. Added support for persistent connections and chunked transfer encoding.

projects.title: Load Balancer
projects.description: Developed a round-robin load balancer in Go to distribute incoming HTTP requests across multiple backend servers efficiently. Implemented concurrent request handling using goroutines, synchronization primitives, mutexes, and wait groups.

projects.title: Gym Equipment E-Commerce Website
projects.description: A full-stack e-commerce platform for gym equipment featuring product browsing, cart management, secure authentication with Spring Security, role-based admin dashboard control, responsive Thymeleaf views, and optimized PostgreSQL persistence using JPA/Hibernate.
